items.title: SBI Holdings’ B2C2 designates Solana as primary stablecoin network for institutional clients
items.whyYouShouldCare: SBI Holdings' choice of Solana for stablecoin transactions enhances its credibility and could attract more institutional interest, boosting SOL's liquidity.

items.title: GalaxyOne launches Solana staking with 6.5% yield, zero fees through 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: GalaxyOne's staking offering with no fees and a competitive yield may increase user engagement and capital inflow into the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana DeFi platform Drift confirms 'active attack' as $200M+ leaves platform
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $200M+ outflow from Drift due to an active attack raises concerns about security, potentially impacting user confidence and overall DeFi activity on Solana.
